description: Evaluate a potential leukemia cluster where 8 cases of pediatric leukemia were observed over 3 years against an expected value of 3.6 cases using Epi Info 7's StatCalc Poisson Probability tool. Create a report at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\cluster_evaluation.txt including the observed and expected values, the probability of observing 8 or more cases (P(X >= k)), and a conclusion statement: 'Statistically significant at alpha=0.05' if the probability is < 0.05, otherwise 'Not statistically significant'.
